documents.label: 278 Transaction
documents.title: Secretary, Department of Education
documents.summary: Periodic Transaction Report (OGE Form 278-T) signed by McMahon on 07/02/2025 and OGE-certified 03/30/2026. Discloses one transaction: a sale of Trump Media & Tech Group Corp (DJT) on 06/12/2025 in the $100,001-$250,000 range, marked No on the 30-day notification flag.

documents.label: 278 Transaction
documents.title: Secretary, Department of Education
documents.summary: Large 278-T signed 05/30/2025 disclosing 124+ transactions, almost entirely state and municipal bond sales and purchases plus one Ares Management Corp (ARES) sale in the $5,000,001-$25,000,000 range. The vast majority of rows are marked Yes in the Notification Received Over 30 Days Ago column, indicating the filer received notification more than 30 days before the report. Transaction dates cluster between December 2024 and May 2025.

documents.label: Certification of Ethics Agreement Compliance
documents.title: Secretary, Department of Education
documents.summary: Ethics Agreement Compliance Certification signed 5/31/2025. Lists ethics agreement signed 02/05/2025, confirmed 03/03/2025, with a certification due date of 06/09/2025. Marks Yes on resignations, No on the divestitures-completed-within-time-period question, and Yes on having filed a 278-T to disclose the divestitures (filing date 5-31-25). Comments section discloses that all divestitures are complete except North Haven Private Income Fund LLC, which is only redeemable quarterly and which McMahon states will be addressed by the end of June.

propublicaCheck.discrepancies: Verified against ProPublica's appointee page for Linda McMahon. ProPublica's page embeds 2 unique DocumentCloud disclosure documents; Open Cabinet may list additional OGE-indexed ethics, compliance, certificate, waiver, or request-only records that ProPublica does not expose as separate DocumentCloud PDFs. No contradictory filing record was identified in this check.
